name: Office Visio MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server by prolific Office-integration developer GongRzhe enabling AI agents to create and manipulate Microsoft Visio diagrams — generating flowcharts, network diagrams, org charts, process flows, and other visual diagrams programmatically. Allows agents to produce Visio files from structured data or natural language descriptions.
use_cases: Generating flowcharts and process diagrams from agent-analyzed workflows
Creating network topology diagrams from infrastructure data
Producing org charts from organizational data from planning agents
Converting text descriptions to Visio diagrams from documentation agents
not_for: Teams without Microsoft Visio license (Visio is paid Microsoft software)
Cross-platform teams needing SVG/PNG output (use draw.io or Mermaid alternatives)
Simple diagram generation where Mermaid or D3 suffice
best_when: An enterprise team standardized on Microsoft Visio wants AI agents to programmatically generate Visio diagrams — particularly for creating standardized technical documentation and process flows.
avoid_when: You don't have Visio installed or licensed — free alternatives (draw.io, Mermaid, Lucidchart) likely serve better without the Microsoft license requirement.

auth.notes: No authentication for MCP server. Requires Microsoft Visio to be installed locally. Visio license required from Microsoft.

pricing.free_tier_limits: MCP server is free; Visio license required (not free)
pricing.paid_tiers: Microsoft Visio Plan 1 starts at ~$5/user/month; Visio Plan 2 at ~$15/user/month
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source from GongRzhe. Microsoft Visio license is required and costs money. Microsoft 365 may include Visio Online but not full desktop version.

performance.rate_limits: Local — no rate limits; bounded by Visio application performance

known_agent_gotchas: Requires Microsoft Visio installed and licensed — Windows only for desktop Visio
Visio COM automation can be slow for complex diagrams — implement appropriate timeouts
GongRzhe is a prolific community Office MCP developer — generally good quality
Visio file formats (.vsdx) may not be viewable without Visio — consider export format
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local Visio automation. Diagram files created locally. No external data transmission. Visio files may contain embedded metadata — review before sharing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. No external transmission. Visio files can contain macros — review files before distribution. Windows-only for full Visio automation.
